ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the statistics are tracked */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Batting and throwing handedness */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "current_team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player status (e.g., Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team plays in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the game is played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the player played in the game */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "hr_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of home runs allowed by the pitcher */,
  "p_walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks issued by the pitcher */,
  "p_k" INTEGER /* Strikeouts by the pitcher */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in (RBIs) */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "sacrifice_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage (OBP) */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage (SLG) */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "in_lineup" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player is in the lineup */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the lineup */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order position (1-9) */,
  "substitution" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player was substituted during the game */,
  "substitution_time" TEXT /* Time of substitution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup entry */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "batter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batter */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the matchup (e.g., hit, strikeout) */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Number of pitches thrown by the pitcher */,
  "pitch_types" TEXT /* Types of pitches thrown */,
  "pitch_speed" REAL /* Average speed of pitches thrown */,
  "pitch_location" TEXT /* Location of the pitch */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning in which the matchup occurred */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the matchup occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_batter_id FOREIGN KEY ("batter_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_periods" (
  "scoring_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring period */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the scoring period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the scoring period */,
  "period_number" TEXT /* Number of the scoring period (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "home_team_score_period" INTEGER /* Home team's score in the period */,
  "away_team_score_period" INTEGER /* Away team's score in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scoring_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "is_playoffs" INTEGER /* Indicator if the season is playoff */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligible_slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligible slot entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineup */,
  "eligible" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player is eligible for this slot */,
  "slot_position" TEXT /* Position of the slot in the lineup */,
  "substitution_eligible" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player is eligible for substitution in this slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eligible_slots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eligible_slots_lineup_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineup_id") REFERENCES lineups ("lineup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit in the season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average for the season */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the player for the season */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in the season */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases (1B, 2B, 3B, HR) */,
  "walks_per_game" REAL /* Average walks per game */,
  "strikeouts_per_game" REAL /* Average strikeouts per game */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging_per_game" REAL /* Average on-base plus slugging (OPS) per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach left the team */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coaching record (e.g., 100-60) */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
